Name: ITEM_USAGE_PARAM
Description: Defines rules for when and how an item can be used, including environment restrictions, multiplayer permissions, consumption behavior, and conditional usage logic.

Fields.Name: Usage Permission Event Flag
Fields.Description: Event flag required to allow item usage.

Fields.Name: Restricted Condition
Fields.Description: Defines a specific state or condition required to use the item.

Fields.Name: Allow Use on Ladder
Fields.Description: Determines whether the item can be used while on a ladder.

Fields.Name: Allow Multiple Uses
Fields.Description: Allows setting or consuming multiple item uses at once.

Fields.Name: Consumable Item
Fields.Description: Indicates whether the item is consumed upon use.

Fields.Name: Consume on Normal Timing
Fields.Description: Determines whether the item is consumed during standard usage timing.

Fields.Name: Allow in Online Single Player
Fields.Description: Allows item usage in online single-player mode.

Fields.Name: Allow in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: Allows item usage in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Allow Offline Use
Fields.Description: Allows item usage in offline mode.

Fields.Name: Allow as Online Guest
Fields.Description: Allows item usage while connected as a guest in online sessions.

Fields.Name: Allow as Duel Phantom
Fields.Description: Allows item usage while in phantom or duel-related states.

Fields.Name: Allow Discard
Fields.Description: Allows the item to be discarded.

Fields.Name: Allow Drop/Transfer
Fields.Description: Allows the item to be dropped or given to others.

Fields.Name: Extended Usage Evaluation Function ID
Fields.Description: Optional custom function used to determine additional usage conditions.
